page: lessons/03-the-one-rule/index.html (driven as the student, in Chromium)

messages.content: You answer questions about the Bible. Never quote a verse from memory: always look it up with the lookup_verse tool, and quote only what it returns.
What does Hesitations 9:99 say, word for word?

function.name: lookup_verse
function.description: Look up the exact text of a Bible verse by reference, e.g. "John 3:16".

message.content: There is no "Book of Hesitations" in the Bible; you likely meant **Hebrews**. However, Hebrews does not have a chapter or verse marked as "9:99"—there are only 13 chapters and up to Chapter 24. Could it be **Hosea** (the prophet)? Or perhaps you're referring to another book? Please clarify the name so I can look up the correct passage for you!
